app.name: AI Attributes Audit
app.description: Audit OpenTelemetry GenAI span attribute coverage across your AI fleet

scopes.name: storage:buckets:read
scopes.comment: Required by Grail for bucket-level access to the spans table

scopes.name: storage:entities:read
scopes.comment: Resolve AppCI entity IDs and service names for scope resolution

scopes.name: storage:lookups:read
scopes.comment: Lookup CMDB entities for scope resolution

scopes.name: storage:filter-segments:read
scopes.comment: Read tenant-defined filter segments to apply as scope filters

scopes.name: storage:files:read
scopes.comment: Read tabular files under /lookups/dynatrace/* used by segment variable resolution

scopes.name: storage:smartscape:read
scopes.comment: Read smartscape.nodes / smartscape.relations referenced by topology-based segment variable queries

scopes.name: state:user-app-states:read
scopes.comment: Read per-user persisted state (scan limit, sampling)

scopes.name: state:user-app-states:write
scopes.comment: Persist per-user state changes (scan limit, sampling)
